scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -z "$1" ]; then echo "Usage: npm start <workspace>"; exit 1; fi; npm run dev -w "$1"' --
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -z "$1" ]; then echo "Usage: npm run build <workspace>"; exit 1; fi; npm run build -w "$1"' --
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w utils && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently -n crawlers,logic,api,frontend -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "npm run dev -w crawlers" "npm run dev -w logic" "npm run dev -w api-server" "npm run dev -w frontend"
